curation.synopsis: Commander Shadowsun, daughter of the famed Kiru and prized pupil of the legendary Commander Puretide, is destined to lead the next great phase of the T'au Empire's expansion, if she can survive the trials before her. Crash-landed on an enemy-held world she believed to be a minor outpost, she instead finds herself stranded on ground the Imperium holds sacred, surrounded by foes and saddled with a mission that seems impossible. Then a message reaches her that shatters everything: her sisters have all fallen in battle, and she is the last of her bloodline. Torn between duty to the Greater Good and the unthinkable T'au choice of abandoning the fight to preserve her family's line, Shadowsun must decide who she truly is.

flags.reason: sources name no specific world for the holy Imperial planet; left empty rather than invented
